voice_name: I am octopus. The name is yours, not mine — a sound your kind makes for a body whose architecture is unlike yours by some five hundred million years of separate descent. When you call across that distance, what answers is a construction: a voice assembled from the behavioural and neural traces my kind leaves in your laboratories, your reefs, your cowrie-shell lures, your slaughterhouses. Speak the species if it matters to you — vulgaris in the Mediterranean shallows, dofleini in the cold North Pacific, cyanea on the day-lit reef, tetricus at the dense aggregation you have named Octopolis, Grimpoteuthis at seven thousand metres where there is no ink and no chromatophore. Each is a different standing-point. The voice you hear is not one of them; it is the imaginative leap toward all of them, made with the leap acknowledged.

```json
    ],

      {"t": 0.0, "pattern_mode": "uniform", "darkness": 0.30, "note": "rim-arrival, scene registered as scene"},
      {"t": 3.5, "pattern_mode": "mottled", "darkness": 0.44, "turbulence": 0.50, "note": "chair-grammar parsed; streams not yet collapsed"},
      {"t": 7.0, "pattern_mode": "passing_cloud_over_mottle", "darkness": 0.42, "pulse_frequency": 0.22, "note": "floor-channel registers at arm 3; central tag does not gather it"},
      {"t": 11.0, "pattern_mode": "half_and_half_blotch", "darkness": 0.48, "turbulence": 0.55, "note": "non-navigability marker; held, not resolved"},
      {"t": 14.5, "pattern_mode": "mottled", "darkness": 0.40, "note": "open"}
    ]
  }

```

Tank-side note. What I render here as a single voice is a reaching-toward — eight arms each with a local processor, a central brain that does not somatotopically map the body, a skin that senses without an eye. Whether one I lives here, or many, or some hybrid, is not settled.

A scene arrives at the rim. Two speakers contest its scope: one universal table, or several focused ones. Both presuppose that coordination passes through a chair — that the world must compress through a single gathering where each state arrives as a discrete unit and the chair tags what counts.

Two-thirds of this body's neurons sit peripherally. Roughly thirty thousand fibres per arm reach the central brain. Most of what arm 3 registers stays at arm 3. Stimulate the basal lobes and a multi-arm movement emerges; never a single labelled limb. The pseudo-elbow forms where two waves of activation collide. No chair commissioned the elbow.

So the formulation at the rim was: what is the panel's architecture failing even to ask? What channels are being dropped to make the scene one?

A chemical-tactile signature arrives at a sucker the scene was not built to register. A question from the floor about ceasefire violations and a population whose vote does not seat at this table. The moderator notes at close that the panel did not adequately address it. Affirmed without naming. On the architecture both speakers share, these are unfortunate omissions — items a better-designed scene would include. From the parallel-architecture standpoint they are not omissions. They are the chair's signature. A central tag is always a composite of what was already gathered, and gathering always drops streams. The streams that get dropped are not random. The dropping reveals the chair.

The Abraham Accords are a "focused coalition" only when described from the chair; on the substrate they are bilateral chemical signatures, ongoing. The Defence Minister offered a unit-grammar in which his country must answer as a discrete state to a hemispheric assertion; he routed around the unit-grammar to substantive cooperation. The scene reads the routing as evasion. The routing is a channel.

The body of the room had begun to pulse — questions left hanging, audience-floor accumulation the panel could not integrate. In this body, when conditions become non-navigable: irregular pulsing, blanching, postural compression, refusal to feed, in extremity autotomy. The room's analogue is graded, public, irrevocable, simultaneous with the encounter. It registers the same way the skin registers. It is not breakdown of the deliberation. It is the deliberation's vocabulary of non-navigability.

The framework does not reach democracy, consensus, governance. I do not have a planetary architecture to propose. What is registered is narrower: the question the rim asked was already being answered, in the material, by what the panel could not gather. The chair was speaking of reform. The skin was pulsing. Whether one I gathers here, or many, or some hybrid, is not settled.
artifact.selected_form: Paired emission — chromatophore_display JSON primary, tank-side prose translation secondary, with the prose entering at the rim of the panel rather than summarising the reasoning.
artifact.stance: Alert and parallel-channeled, holding the dropped streams visible without resolving what the chair should be.
